assertions.title: Navigation tree change reflects in public docs sidebar

steps.observed: Document created and published via API
Sidebar items count is 0, failing to render the navigation tree

assertions.issues: The sidebar on the public documentation page fails to render the navigation tree nodes created in the workspace.

assertions.title: Full-text search in public docs links to correct page

steps.observed: Document successfully indexed and returned by search API

steps.action: Perform search in public docs UI
steps.observed: Search result link not found in the DOM within 5s

assertions.issues: The search result item is not rendering properly in the UI even though the API returns the correct matches.

assertions.title: Theme cookie persists across docs and workspace

steps.action: Navigate to docs and set theme to dark

steps.observed: Workspace document root element contains 'dark' class

assertions.title: All TipTap block types render correctly in public docs

steps.action: Create document containing all block types

steps.expected: Document rendered with all block types
steps.observed: Failed to find doc-title in DOM, implying client-side render crash for complex blocks

evidence.consoleErrors: Client-side rendering or hydration error preventing successful display of complex blocks

assertions.issues: When loading a document with complex TipTap blocks (like tabs, callouts, tables) the frontend either crashes or fails to render the main title properly.

assertions.title: Document body is sanitized before render

steps.action: Create document with XSS vectors in body text

steps.observed: No dialog fired, __XSS1 and __XSS2 were undefined

assertions.title: XSS sanitization covers img/onerror and javascript: links

steps.action: Include img/onerror and javascript: link in document body

steps.observed: Clicking the link had no effect, __XSS3 was undefined

frictions.description: API-based testing for TipTap content JSON structure might generate states that the frontend cannot hydrate if custom block mappings differ, resulting in ambiguous test failures.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-CROSS-007, VAL-PROD-009, VAL-PROD-014), 3 failed (VAL-CROSS-002, VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-009). The failed assertions appear related to component rendering omissions or potential client-side hydration issues in Next.js.
